questions.text: What is the primary advantage of FastText over standard Word2Vec?
options: It can generate semantic vector representations for unseen (OOV) words by aggregating subword n-gram embeddings.
It has a smaller dictionary size.
It uses a deep feedforward network.
questions.correct_answer: It can generate semantic vector representations for unseen (OOV) words by aggregating subword n-gram embeddings.
questions.explanation: Because it builds vectors from character-level chunks, FastText retains the ability to represent morphologically similar OOV tokens.
